segments: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ لَا بَأْسَ بِأَكْلِ لُحُومِ الْجَوَامِيسِ وَ شُرْبِ أَلْبَانِهَا وَ أَكْلِ سُمُونِهَا.
arabic.text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ لَا بَأْسَ بِأَكْلِ لُحُومِ الْجَوَامِيسِ وَ شُرْبِ أَلْبَانِهَا وَ أَكْلِ سُمُونِهَا.

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, and Ali Bin Muhammad, both together from Ali Bin Al Hassan Al Tameemy, from Ayoub Bin Nuh, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Abdullah Bin Jundab who said,
‘I heard Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘There is no problem with eating the Buffalo meats and drinking their milks, and eating their butter’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, and Ali Bin Muhammad, both together from Ali Bin Al Hassan Al Tameemy, from Ayoub Bin Nuh, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Abdullah Bin Jundab who said,

‘I heard Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘There is no problem with eating the Buffalo meats and drinking their milks, and eating their butter’.

segments: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from and Afi ibn Muhammad all from Ali ibn al-Husayn al-Tamimiy from Ayyub ibn Nuh from Safwan ibn Yahya from ‘Abd Allah ibn Jundab who has said the following: “I once heard abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘It is not unlawful to eat buffalo meat and the use of its milk and ghee for food.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from and Afi ibn Muhammad all from Ali ibn al-Husayn al-Tamimiy from Ayyub ibn Nuh from Safwan ibn Yahya from ‘Abd Allah ibn Jundab who has said the following: “I once heard abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘It is not unlawful to eat buffalo meat and the use of its milk and ghee for food.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/136)
gradings.label: موثق
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/136)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ وَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ جَمِيعاً عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحَسَنِ التَّيْمِيِّ عَنْ أَيُّوبَ بْنِ نُوحٍ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ بْنِ يَحْيَى عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ جُنْدَبٍ قَالَ

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ لُحُومِ الْجَوَامِيسِ وَ أَلْبَانِهَا فَقَالَ لَا بَأْسَ بِهِمَا .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ لُحُومِ الْجَوَامِيسِ وَ أَلْبَانِهَا فَقَالَ لَا بَأْسَ بِهِمَا .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husay, from Safwan, from Abdullah Bin Jundab who said,
‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> about the Buffalo meats and their milks. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem with these’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husay, from Safwan, from Abdullah Bin Jundab who said,

‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> about the Buffalo meats and their milks. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem with these’.

segments: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn abu al-Hassan from Safwan from ‘Abd Allah ibn Jundab who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the meat of a buffalos and its milk. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is not unlawful to use such items for food.’”
en.sarwar.text: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn abu al-Hassan from Safwan from ‘Abd Allah ibn Jundab who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the meat of a buffalos and its milk. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is not unlawful to use such items for food.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/136)
gradings.label: صحيح
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/136)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ جُنْدَبٍ قَالَ
